name: ten1010-io
description: AI-powered QA automation and Git workflow toolkit for Claude Code.

plugins.name: claude-toolkit
plugins.description: AI-powered QA automation and Git workflow toolkit. /aqa-inspect runs end-to-end QA (generate test cases from a Figma design or live-URL exploration → execute → results.csv + HTML report), /aqa-jira files Jira tickets from failed QA results behind a human gate, /pr creates pull requests, /merge-check does dry-run merge validation.
